content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: Pull request opened (feat/review-9poal-ncgr-locus29329) - this is a request for code review feedback
b. This is a request for code review feedback - the user wants me to review the PR for code quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage
c. Key information:
   - PR adds GO annotation review for 9POAL NCGR_LOCUS29329 (bifunctional AK-HSD enzyme)
   - 6 files changed: new gene folder with review files, cached publication, updated GO terms
   - Review covers 11 IEA GO annotations with 7 accepted, 3 marked as over-annotated
   - Manual file creation since `just fetch-gene` couldn't resolve the gene name
   - All annotations are IEA (computational inference) with no experimental evidence
d. Main tasks:
   - Read and analyze the changed files, especially the YAML review file
   - Check adherence to schema and project guidelines from CLAUDE.md
   - Validate the review methodology and conclusions
   - Check for any potential issues with file structure, naming, or content
e. Plan:
   - Read the main review file and supporting files
   - Validate against schema and guidelines
   - Check the validation passes as mentioned in test plan
   - Provide comprehensive feedback on the review quality and methodology
f. I should be able to complete this review by reading the files and providing feedback
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review for 9POAL NCGR_LOCUS29329 GO Annotation Review Starting comprehensive review of the GO annotation review for the bifunctional aspartate kinase / homoserine dehydrogenase gene. #### Todo List: - [ ] Read and analyze the main review YAML file - [ ] Check supporting files (UniProt, GOA, notes, publication) - [ ] Validate against schema and project guidelines - [ ] Check file structure and naming conventions - [ ] Assess review methodology and conclusions - [ ] Verify validation passes as claimed - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24819588963)
